title: Quality Inspector (Stamping / Precision Manufacturing) - Up to $3,500
description:
• Position : Quality Inspector (Stamping / Precision Manufacturing) - Up to $3,500
  • Location : West – Kian Teck Way (Transport Pickup from Boon Lay, Jurong East, Jurong West, Pioneer, Woodlands & Admiralty)
  • Working hours : 4 Days Work Week (Rotating Shift) | 7am to 7pm & 7pm to 7am
  • Salary (commensurate with experience) : Up to $3,500 + Variable Bonus + Allowance + Annual leaves + Medical Insurance
  • Duration : Permanent
  • Industry : Precision Manufacturing

Main Responsibilities:

  • Perform set-up, in-process and outgoing inspection per quality plan
  • Conduct final (outgoing) inspection before packing
  • Record inspection results, test data, and any deviations accurately
  • Stop production when defects are found; inform setter/toolmaker to rectify
  • Raise PRF and ensure rejected parts are properly tagged and segregated
  • Ensure inspection status identification is placed on inspected parts
  • Isolate/purge rejected parts to prevent mix-up with good parts
  • Perform last-piece inspection after production/tool-down and feedback to toolmaker
  • Update SPC control charts (X-bar/R) and Cpk/CPK data as required
  • Other ad-hoc duties assigned

Requirements:

  • Secondary education or equivalent with Min 2 years QC/inspection experience (stamping / precision engineering preferred)
  • Able to use measuring equipment (e.g., Smartscope, profile projector, toolmaker’s scope, height gauge)
  • Can read technical drawings and basic GD&T
  • Basic SPC knowledge (X-bar/R chart, Cpk/CPK)
  • Understand common stamping defects and basic sampling/visual inspection plans


Email to: chloe@searchpersonnel.com.sg

Do visit www.facebook.com/search.personnel and https://www.instagram.com/search.personnel for more job listings and career tips! 

***We do not charge our candidates any referral fee nor bind them with any contract.***

Chloe Ong 

Associate Consulting Director (APAC)

Reg no.: R22105510

EA No: 13C6684

SEARCH PERSONNEL PRIVATE LIMITED

 

Search Personnel is an established, leading and reputable recruitment company that brings effective services to individuals and organisations with a sense of urgency and commitment.

With Search Personnel you can expect a level of quality and professionalism from experts who know recruitment and understand the market. This enables us to bring the best roles and the best candidates together.
